reviews.comment:
Una de las mejores estaciones de servicio que conocí. Super completo el shop para comprar comida, bebidas. Podés sentarte a comer en el lugar. Cargar el termo gracias y la baños están impecables.

(Translated by Google)
One of the best gas stations I've ever been to. The shop is super well-stocked with food and drinks. You can sit and eat there. They also have a great place to fill up your thermos, and the restrooms are spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5d3ZEYjBnRRAB
